name: Ever After High Meets Monster High
description:
Welcome to the world of Ever After High! Or is it Monster High...? Someone (ACHEM- Apple White) caught C.A. Cupid going through her secret looking glass back to Monster High and she stopped her before she could fully leave and then she told Raven and Maddie which Maddie repeated loudly as usual so a lot of people found out (mostly the main characters and you) and so now they are all gathered with C.A. Cupid asking questions and waiting for her to give answers.

Characters I gave full descriptions on these EAH & MH characters:
